Michele L. Collender, Esq., ATKINSON, ANDELSON, LOYA, RUUD & ROMO, (562) 653-3200, Michele.Collender@aalrr.com for Defendant MCCORMACK BARON MANAGEMENT, INC.

PLAINTIFF STEVEN JEFFERSON, STEVEN JEFFERSON Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, Attorney Fee Award, Cost Award, And Class Representative Enhancement Payment

Hearing is held. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's "motion for final approval of class action settlement, attorney fee award, cost award, class action representative enhancement payment" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
